message:
feat(core): add multi-issue update validation, refactor FK handling, and improve test isolation

- Add validate_multi_issue_external_ref_update() to prevent external_ref on multiple issues
- Add validate_route_runtime_guards() for claim operations with expect_unassigned and claim_exclusive flags
- Move foreign key handling from storage RAII guard to sync-level restore_foreign_keys_after_import()
- Fix relative time formatting to normalize 12+ months to "1 year ago"
- Add hermetic test environment by clearing inherited BD_*/BEADS_*/TOON_* env vars before tests
- Add comprehensive E2E tests for multi-issue atomic operations, env overrides, and routing
- Add zip crate dependency for compression support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
